title: Malveopsis setosa
taxonomy: Malveopsis setosa is a species within the family Malvaceae. It belongs to the order Malvales. The Malvaceae family consists of various flowering plants commonly known as mallow or hibiscus plants. Malveopsis setosa is closely related to other species in the Malvaceae family due to shared characteristics and genetic similarities. The classification of Malveopsis setosa reflects its evolutionary relationships within the Malvales order and Malvaceae family.

The plant is said to possess anti-inflammatory properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory diseases.
